stages.objective: Observe translation activity and reuse windows in memory trace.
stages.goal: Identify where repeated references should benefit from cached translations.
stages.theory_detail: TLB-like reuse appears when recently translated pages are referenced again before replacement.

hints.nudge: Look for repeated virtual page references.
hints.concept: Reuse windows lower translation overhead and fault exposure.
hints.explicit: Annotate repeated accesses and verify improved behavior in counters.

stages.objective: Diagnose whether expected reuse appears in results.
stages.goal: Pass required fault/trace checks for locality pattern.

hints.concept: Cold-start misses should decrease on local repetition.
hints.explicit: Reset and rerun to confirm lower fault condition in the second half of sequence.

stages.objective: Apply capacity tuning and validate translation behavior.
stages.goal: Preserve or improve fault outcomes with bounded config edits.

hints.concept: Capacity tuning should reinforce locality benefits.
hints.explicit: Change one setting, rerun, and submit when all checks pass.
